summary: The network multiplex test divergence is rustfmt-only pattern, return, and continue formatting; no test protocol behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 178: M	crates/net/network/tests/it/multiplex.rs.
The isolated patch reformats Ping/Pong message pattern alternatives and adds semicolons to decode, stream poll, continue, and pending returns.
No test protocol encoding, decoding, initial ping behavior, pong response handling, or stream polling behavior changed.
